title: Highlight
description: A single descriptive claim about a product, framed as an agent-readable statement. Highlights surface what makes a product distinctive — performance characteristics, design choices, durability, value, sustainability, compatibility.

statement.description: The highlight, written as a single declarative sentence (e.g., 'Waterproof to 30 meters'). MUST be self-contained — readers should not need product context to understand it.

category.description: Open category label grouping highlights of similar kind. Well-known values: `performance`, `design`, `durability`, `value`, `sustainability`, `compatibility`. Implementations MAY use additional values.

evidence_ref.description: Optional URI pointing to evidence backing the claim — a product spec sheet, third-party review, certification record.
